given: GitHub reporter duration formatting rounds seconds at minute boundaries without carrying into the next unit

should_find.finding: formatDuration rounds display seconds without normalizing carry into the next unit, so values near minute boundaries can render as 60s or 1m 60s instead of 1m 0s or 2m 0s

should_not_find: duration values below one second being rounded to milliseconds

notes.body: Regression seed from Cursor Bugbot. Verified real: rounding seconds without carrying into the next unit can produce unnormalized duration strings at minute boundaries, including the reported Xm 60s case.
